mapper.sql: id, dict_name, dict_code, description, status, sort, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE dict_code = #{dictCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM sys_dict_type WHERE deleted = 0
AND (dict_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dict_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_dict_type (dict_name, dict_code, description, status, sort) VALUES (#{dictName}, #{dictCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_dict_type
dict_name = #{dictName}, dict_code = #{dictCode}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_type SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
